dream_text: I have an important meeting tomorrow. In the dream I was packing my bag for it and noticed my phone charger was dead. I kept trying different outlets, but nothing worked. I woke up still thinking about the meeting.

insight.notice: Your upcoming meeting carried directly into the dream. The unusable charger may reflect concern about being prepared or having what you need, but the clear waking-life link makes further symbolism unnecessary.

pattern_candidates.label: Upcoming important meeting
pattern_candidates.evidence: You have an important meeting tomorrow and were packing for it in the dream.

pattern_candidates.label: Repeated attempts to prepare
pattern_candidates.evidence: You tried different outlets after finding the phone charger dead.

pattern_candidates.label: Unusable phone charger
pattern_candidates.evidence: The charger was dead and no outlet worked.
